title: AI SaaS DevTools PLG Framework
description: Product-Led Growth framework designed for AI automation SaaS platforms targeting developers and businesses, tracking the journey from discovery to enterprise expansion

milestones.title: Landing Page Engagement
milestones.description: User visits landing page and shows initial interest through scrolling, video watching, or demo interaction

milestones.title: Problem Recognition
milestones.description: User identifies with automation pain points and recognizes value proposition through content or pricing page visit

milestones.title: Social Proof Validation
milestones.description: User engages with testimonials, case studies, or community content to validate solution credibility

milestones.title: Sign-Up Intent
milestones.description: User clicks sign-up or starts registration process, indicating intent to try the platform

metrics.name: Traffic to Sign-up Conversion Rate
metrics.howToMeasure: Percentage of website visitors who start the registration process

metrics.name: Pricing Page Engagement Rate
metrics.howToMeasure: Percentage of visitors who view pricing page from landing page

metrics.name: Demo Video Completion Rate
metrics.howToMeasure: Percentage of users who watch demo video to completion

metrics.name: Time on Landing Page
metrics.howToMeasure: Average time spent on landing page before conversion or exit

milestones.title: Account Creation
milestones.description: User successfully completes registration and email verification with Supabase Auth

milestones.title: Onboarding Flow Completion
milestones.description: User completes the multi-step onboarding including AI preferences, channels, and skills configuration

milestones.title: Agent Provisioning
milestones.description: Personal AI agent is successfully provisioned and ready for interaction

milestones.title: Discovery Session Participation
milestones.description: User engages with the discovery coach to identify automation opportunities and receive recommendations

milestones.title: First Project Creation
milestones.description: User creates their first automation project based on discovery recommendations or manual setup

metrics.name: Onboarding Completion Rate
metrics.howToMeasure: Percentage of registered users who complete all onboarding steps within 7 days

metrics.name: Time to Agent Provisioning
metrics.howToMeasure: Average time from account creation to successful agent provisioning

metrics.name: Discovery Session Completion Rate
metrics.howToMeasure: Percentage of users who complete the full discovery interview process

metrics.name: First Project Creation Rate
metrics.howToMeasure: Percentage of users who create at least one project within 24 hours of onboarding

milestones.title: First AI Interaction
milestones.description: User successfully sends first message to AI agent and receives a meaningful response

milestones.title: Multi-turn Conversation
milestones.description: User engages in extended conversation with AI agent (5+ message exchanges) showing comfort with interface

milestones.title: First Automation Success
milestones.description: AI agent successfully completes a task or automation that provides clear value to the user

milestones.title: Feature Discovery
milestones.description: User explores additional features like voice interaction, file management, or channel integrations

milestones.title: Achievement Unlock
milestones.description: User unlocks their first achievement badge, indicating platform exploration and engagement

metrics.name: First Message Success Rate
metrics.howToMeasure: Percentage of users who successfully send and receive first AI response within 48 hours

metrics.name: Time to First Value
metrics.howToMeasure: Average time from account creation to first successful automation completion

metrics.name: Session Engagement Depth
metrics.howToMeasure: Average number of messages per session in first week

metrics.name: Feature Adoption Rate
metrics.howToMeasure: Percentage of activated users who try at least 2 different features

milestones.title: Regular Usage Pattern
milestones.description: User returns to platform at least 3 times per week for 2 consecutive weeks

milestones.title: Multiple Project Creation
milestones.description: User creates and manages 3+ different automation projects for various use cases

milestones.title: Advanced Feature Adoption
milestones.description: User utilizes advanced features like voice discovery, memory management, or custom skill bundles

milestones.title: Integration Setup
milestones.description: User successfully connects AI agent to external channels like WhatsApp, Slack, or email

milestones.title: Workflow Optimization
milestones.description: User iterates on projects, showing evidence of workflow refinement and platform mastery

metrics.name: Weekly Active User Rate
metrics.howToMeasure: Percentage of activated users who use platform at least once per week

metrics.name: Average Projects per User
metrics.howToMeasure: Mean number of active projects created by engaged users

metrics.name: Feature Stickiness
metrics.howToMeasure: Percentage of engaged users who use advanced features monthly

metrics.name: Session Frequency
metrics.howToMeasure: Average number of platform visits per user per week

milestones.title: Usage Limit Approach
milestones.description: Free tier user approaches or hits usage limits, triggering upgrade consideration

milestones.title: Premium Feature Interest
milestones.description: User explores Pro or Business tier features or clicks upgrade prompts

milestones.title: Trial Initiation
milestones.description: User starts free trial of Pro tier to experience premium AI models and features

milestones.title: Payment Conversion
milestones.description: User successfully upgrades to paid tier and completes first payment

milestones.title: Plan Optimization
milestones.description: User evaluates and potentially upgrades to higher tier based on usage patterns

metrics.name: Free to Paid Conversion Rate
metrics.howToMeasure: Percentage of engaged free users who upgrade to paid tier within 30 days

metrics.name: Trial to Paid Conversion Rate
metrics.howToMeasure: Percentage of trial users who convert to paying customers

metrics.name: Time to First Payment
metrics.howToMeasure: Average days from account creation to first successful payment

metrics.name: Upgrade Trigger Effectiveness
metrics.howToMeasure: Percentage of usage limit notifications that result in upgrade within 7 days

milestones.title: First Month Retention
milestones.description: Paid user continues subscription and maintains active usage through first 30 days

milestones.title: Workflow Dependency
milestones.description: User integrates platform deeply into daily workflows, making it essential to their operations

milestones.title: Advanced Usage Patterns
milestones.description: User leverages sophisticated features like complex project templates, team sharing, or API integrations

milestones.title: Community Engagement
milestones.description: User shares templates, provides feedback, or engages with platform community and support

milestones.title: Renewal Success
milestones.description: User successfully renews subscription, indicating long-term platform value

metrics.name: Monthly Retention Rate
metrics.howToMeasure: Percentage of paid users who remain active after 30, 60, and 90 days

metrics.name: Customer Lifetime Value
metrics.howToMeasure: Average revenue generated per customer over their entire subscription lifetime

metrics.name: Feature Depth Score
metrics.howToMeasure: Average number of different features used by retained customers per month

metrics.name: Support Satisfaction Score
metrics.howToMeasure: Average satisfaction rating from customer support interactions

milestones.title: Plan Upgrade
milestones.description: User upgrades to higher tier (Pro to Business) based on increased usage and team needs

milestones.title: Team Invitation
milestones.description: User invites team members or colleagues to join platform, expanding account value

milestones.title: Referral Generation
milestones.description: Satisfied user refers new customers through word-of-mouth or formal referral program

milestones.title: Enterprise Interest
milestones.description: User or organization expresses interest in enterprise features, custom solutions, or volume pricing

milestones.title: Advocacy Activities
milestones.description: User becomes platform advocate through case studies, testimonials, or community leadership

metrics.name: Account Expansion Rate
metrics.howToMeasure: Percentage of customers who increase their plan tier or add team members quarterly

metrics.name: Referral Conversion Rate
metrics.howToMeasure: Percentage of referred users who convert to paid customers

metrics.name: Net Revenue Retention
metrics.howToMeasure: Revenue growth from existing customers through upgrades and expansion

metrics.name: Advocacy Engagement Rate
metrics.howToMeasure: Percentage of retained customers who participate in referrals, reviews, or case studies

metadata.framework_description: Comprehensive PLG framework for AI automation SaaS platforms, focusing on developer-friendly tools with enterprise scalability. Tracks user journey from initial discovery through advocacy, with emphasis on technical onboarding, feature adoption, and value realization.
metadata.usage: Ideal for AI/ML SaaS products, developer tools, and automation platforms targeting both individual professionals and enterprise teams. Includes metrics for technical integration success and advanced feature adoption.
